let _editAvatarUrl = '';
let _editCountry = '';

function openEditCountryPicker() {
  dbg('[PROFILE] openEditCountryPicker');
  const picker = document.getElementById('edit-country-picker');
  if (picker.classList.contains('open')) return;
  picker.classList.add('open');
  const input = document.getElementById('edit-country-input');
  input.value = '';
  input.placeholder = 'Search country...';
  let hlIdx = 0;
  renderEditCountryList('', 0);
  input.oninput = () => { hlIdx = 0; renderEditCountryList(input.value, hlIdx); };
  input.onkeydown = (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') { closeEditCountryPicker(); return; }
    const items = document.querySelectorAll('#edit-country-list .country-item[data-code]');
    if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') { e.preventDefault(); hlIdx = Math.min(hlIdx + 1, items.length - 1); highlightCountryItem(items, hlIdx); }
    else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') { e.preventDefault(); hlIdx = Math.max(hlIdx - 1, 0); highlightCountryItem(items, hlIdx); }
    else if (e.key === 'Enter') { e.preventDefault(); if (items[hlIdx]) items[hlIdx].click(); }
  };
  setTimeout(() => document.addEventListener('click', _editCountryOutsideClick), 10);
}

function _editCountryOutsideClick(e) {
  if (!e.target.closest('#edit-country-picker')) closeEditCountryPicker();
}

function closeEditCountryPicker() {
  dbg('[PROFILE] closeEditCountryPicker');
  const picker = document.getElementById('edit-country-picker');
  if (!picker) return;
  picker.classList.remove('open');
  const input = document.getElementById('edit-country-input');
  input.placeholder = 'Country';
  input.oninput = null;
  input.onkeydown = null;
  if (_editCountry) {
    const name = COUNTRIES.find(c => c[0] === _editCountry)?.[1] || '';
    input.value = FLAG(_editCountry) + ' ' + name;
  } else {
    input.value = '';
  }
  document.removeEventListener('click', _editCountryOutsideClick);
}

function renderEditCountryList(query, hlIdx) {
  const list = document.getElementById('edit-country-list');
  if (!list) return;
  const q = query.toLowerCase();
  const matchStart = (haystack, needle) => haystack.toLowerCase().startsWith(needle) || haystack.split(/[\s-]+/).some(w => w.toLowerCase().startsWith(needle));
  const filtered = COUNTRIES.filter(([code, name, alt]) => matchStart(name, q) || code.toLowerCase() === q || (alt && q.length >= 3 && alt.split(/\s+/).some(w => w.toLowerCase().startsWith(q))));
  list.innerHTML = filtered.map(([code, name], i) =>
    `<div class="country-item${i === (hlIdx || 0) ? ' highlighted' : ''}" data-code="${code}" onclick="selectEditCountry('${code}')">`
    + `<span class="flag">${FLAG(code)}</span>${escapeHtml(name)}</div>`
  ).join('') || '<div class="country-item" style="color:var(--color-muted)">No results</div>';
}

function selectEditCountry(code) {
  dbg('[PROFILE] selectEditCountry', code);
  _editCountry = code;
  closeEditCountryPicker();
  const inp = document.getElementById('edit-country-input');
  if (inp) inp.classList.toggle('valid', !!code);
  const status = document.getElementById('edit-country-status');
  if (status) { status.textContent = code ? 'ok' : ''; status.className = 'field-status' + (code ? ' ok' : ''); }
}

let _editAvatarState = null;

function editProfileAvatar() {
  dbg('[AVATAR] editProfileAvatar');
  const input = document.createElement('input');
  input.type = 'file'; input.accept = 'image/*';
  input.onchange = async () => {
    const file = input.files[0];
    if (!file) return;
    const bmp = await createImageBitmap(file);
    if (bmp.width < 128 || bmp.height < 128) { bmp.close(); showToast('Image must be at least 128x128'); return; }
    bmp.close();
    initEditAvatarEditor(file);
  };
  input.click();
}

async function initEditAvatarEditor(file) {
  dbg('[AVATAR] initEditAvatarEditor', file.name);
  const bmp = await createImageBitmap(file);
  const origW = bmp.width, origH = bmp.height;
  bmp.close();

  let previewFile = file;
  let natW = origW, natH = origH;
  if (origW > 2000 || origH > 2000) {
    const scale = 2000 / Math.max(origW, origH);
    natW = Math.round(origW * scale);
    natH = Math.round(origH * scale);
    const resized = await createImageBitmap(file, { resizeWidth: natW, resizeHeight: natH, resizeQuality: 'high' });
    const blob = await _bitmapToBlob(resized, natW, natH);
    previewFile = new File([blob], 'preview.webp', { type: 'image/webp' });
  }

  const previewScale = origW / natW;
  const sz = 80;
  const minScale = sz / Math.min(natW, natH);
  const maxScale = Math.max(minScale * 6, 1);
  const initScale = minScale * 2;
  _editAvatarState = { file, previewFile, natW, natH, origW, origH, previewScale, scale: initScale, minScale, maxScale, x: 0, y: 0, size: sz };
  dbg('[AVATAR] _editAvatarState SET', natW + 'x' + natH, 'previewScale:', previewScale);
  _editAvatarState.x = -(natW * initScale - sz) / 2;
  _editAvatarState.y = -(natH * initScale - sz) / 2;

  const url = URL.createObjectURL(previewFile);
  const el = document.getElementById('edit-avatar-upload');
  el.innerHTML = `<div class="avatar-edit" id="edit-avatar-edit" style="width:${sz}px;height:${sz}px"><img src="${url}" id="edit-avatar-img"></div>`;
  let dragged = false;
  el.onclick = () => { if (!dragged) editProfileAvatar(); };

  const thumb = document.getElementById('edit-avatar-zoom-thumb');
  thumb.classList.remove('hidden');
  const initT = (initScale - minScale) / (maxScale - minScale);
  thumb.style.left = (initT * 86) + 'px';

  let zLastX, zCurrentLeft;
  const zMove = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const cx = e.touches ? e.touches[0].clientX : e.clientX;
    zCurrentLeft += (cx - zLastX) * 0.4;
    zLastX = cx;
    const newLeft = Math.max(0, Math.min(86, zCurrentLeft));
    thumb.style.left = newLeft + 'px';
    const t = newLeft / 86;
    const s = _editAvatarState;
    const oldScale = s.scale;
    s.scale = s.minScale + t * (s.maxScale - s.minScale);
    const ratio = s.scale / oldScale;
    s.x = editClampX(sz / 2 - (sz / 2 - s.x) * ratio);
    s.y = editClampY(sz / 2 - (sz / 2 - s.y) * ratio);
    updateEditAvatarView();
  };
  const zUp = () => { document.removeEventListener('mousemove', zMove); document.removeEventListener('mouseup', zUp); document.removeEventListener('touchmove', zMove); document.removeEventListener('touchend', zUp); };
  thumb.onmousedown = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); zLastX = e.clientX; zCurrentLeft = parseFloat(thumb.style.left); document.addEventListener('mousemove', zMove); document.addEventListener('mouseup', zUp); };
  thumb.ontouchstart = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); zLastX = e.touches[0].clientX; zCurrentLeft = parseFloat(thumb.style.left); document.addEventListener('touchmove', zMove, { passive: false }); document.addEventListener('touchend', zUp); };

  updateEditAvatarView();

  const edit = document.getElementById('edit-avatar-edit');
  let startX, startY, origX, origY;
  const onMove = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); dragged = true; const cx = e.touches ? e.touches[0].clientX : e.clientX; const cy = e.touches ? e.touches[0].clientY : e.clientY; _editAvatarState.x = editClampX(origX + (cx - startX)); _editAvatarState.y = editClampY(origY + (cy - startY)); updateEditAvatarView(); };
  const onUp = () => { document.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMove); document.removeEventListener('mouseup', onUp); document.removeEventListener('touchmove', onMove); document.removeEventListener('touchend', onUp); setTimeout(() => { dragged = false; }, 10); };
  edit.onmousedown = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); dragged = false; startX = e.clientX; startY = e.clientY; origX = _editAvatarState.x; origY = _editAvatarState.y; document.addEventListener('mousemove', onMove); document.addEventListener('mouseup', onUp); };
  edit.ontouchstart = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); dragged = false; startX = e.touches[0].clientX; startY = e.touches[0].clientY; origX = _editAvatarState.x; origY = _editAvatarState.y; document.addEventListener('touchmove', onMove, { passive: false }); document.addEventListener('touchend', function onTouchUp() { document.removeEventListener('touchmove', onMove); document.removeEventListener('touchend', onTouchUp); if (!dragged) editProfileAvatar(); setTimeout(() => { dragged = false; }, 10); }); };
}

function editClampX(x) { const s = _editAvatarState; return Math.min(0, Math.max(x, s.size - s.natW * s.scale)); }
function editClampY(y) { const s = _editAvatarState; return Math.min(0, Math.max(y, s.size - s.natH * s.scale)); }

let _editAvatarPreviewTimer = null;
function updateEditAvatarView() {
  dbg('[AVATAR] updateEditAvatarView');
  const img = document.getElementById('edit-avatar-img');
  if (!img || !_editAvatarState) return;
  const s = _editAvatarState;
  img.style.width = (s.natW * s.scale) + 'px';
  img.style.height = (s.natH * s.scale) + 'px';
  img.style.transform = `translate3d(${s.x}px, ${s.y}px, 0)`;
  clearTimeout(_editAvatarPreviewTimer);
  _editAvatarPreviewTimer = setTimeout(updateEditAvatarPreview, 400);
}

async function updateEditAvatarPreview() {
  dbg('[AVATAR] updateEditAvatarPreview');
  const s = _editAvatarState;
  if (!s) return;
  const cropX = -s.x / s.scale;
  const cropY = -s.y / s.scale;
  const cropSize = s.size / s.scale;
  try {
    const bmp = await createImageBitmap(s.previewFile, cropX, cropY, cropSize, cropSize, { resizeWidth: 128, resizeHeight: 128, resizeQuality: 'high' });
    const blob = await _bitmapToBlob(bmp, 128, 128);
    if (_editAvatarUrl) URL.revokeObjectURL(_editAvatarUrl);
    _editAvatarUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    updateEditPreview();
  } catch (e) { dbg('[AVATAR] edit preview render failed', e.message); }
}

async function saveProfile() {
  dbg('[PROFILE] saveProfile');
  const displayName = document.getElementById('edit-displayname').value.trim();
  const country = _editCountry;
  try {
    const body = {};
    if (displayName !== (currentUser?.display_name || '')) body.display_name = displayName || '';
    if (country !== (currentUser?.country || '')) body.country = country;
    dbg('[PROFILE] saveProfile _editAvatarState:', !!_editAvatarState, '_editAvatarUrl:', _editAvatarUrl);
    if (_editAvatarState) {
      showToast('Processing photo...');
      const s = _editAvatarState;
      dbg('[AVATAR] cropping from original', s.origW + 'x' + s.origH, 'scale:', s.scale, 'previewScale:', s.previewScale);
      const cropX = (-s.x / s.scale) * s.previewScale;
      const cropY = (-s.y / s.scale) * s.previewScale;
      const cropSize = (s.size / s.scale) * s.previewScale;
      const bmp = await createImageBitmap(s.file, cropX, cropY, cropSize, cropSize, { resizeWidth: 128, resizeHeight: 128, resizeQuality: 'high' });
      const blob = await _bitmapToBlob(bmp, 128, 128);
      const form = new FormData();
      form.append('file', new File([blob], 'avatar.webp', { type: 'image/webp' }));
      const resp = await fetch(API + '/upload/avatar', { method: 'POST', body: form, credentials: 'include' });
      if (!resp.ok) throw new Error('Upload failed');
      const result = await resp.json();
      body.avatar_url = result.url;
    }
    if (Object.keys(body).length === 0) { closeProfileModal(); return; }
    await api('/profile', {
      method: 'PUT',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify(body),
    });
    if (body.display_name !== undefined) currentUser.display_name = displayName;
    if (body.country) currentUser.country = country;
    if (body.avatar_url) currentUser.avatar_url = body.avatar_url;
    _editAvatarState = null;
    _editAvatarUrl = '';
    closeProfileModal();
    const headerAvEl = document.querySelector('.header-avatar');
    if (headerAvEl && currentUser.avatar_url) headerAvEl.innerHTML = `<img src="${esc(currentUser.avatar_url)}">`;
    // Update own messages and member list with new profile
    const msgs = messagesByRoom[currentRoom] || [];
    msgs.forEach(m => {
      if (m.user_id === currentUser.id) {
        m.display_name = currentUser.display_name;
        m.avatar_url = currentUser.avatar_url;
      }
    });
    renderMessages();
    renderMemberItems();
    _populateMenuSections();
    showToast('Profile updated');
  } catch (e) { showToast(e.message); }
}

let _pushSubscribed = false;


let _nw = null;
let _nwTimer = null;

function _queueBrowserNotification(data) {
  if (_pushSubscribed) return;
  dbg('[NOTIFY] queue', data.room_id, data.type);
  if (data.type === 'dm') {
    _sendDmNotification(data);
    return;
  }
  if (!_nw) {
    _nw = { count: 0, rooms: new Set(), firstId: null, firstRoomName: null, firstRoomType: null, firstSender: null, firstPreview: null, firstRoomId: null };
  }
  _nw.count++;
  _nw.rooms.add(data.room_id);
  if (!_nw.firstId) {
    _nw.firstId = data.msg_id;
    _nw.firstRoomId = data.room_id;
    _nw.firstRoomName = data.name;
    _nw.firstRoomType = data.type;
    _nw.firstSender = data.sender_name || 'Someone';
    _nw.firstPreview = data.preview || 'New message';
  }
  if (!_nwTimer) {
    _nwTimer = setTimeout(_flushBrowserNotification, 10000);
  }
}

function _sendDmNotification(data) {
  dbg('[NOTIFY] dm instant', data.room_id);
  const sender = data.sender_name || 'Someone';
  const preview = data.preview || 'New message';
  const url = data.msg_id ? '/chat/msg/' + data.msg_id : '/chat/r/' + data.room_id;
  const n = new Notification(sender, { body: preview, icon: '/favicon.png', tag: 'chat-dm-' + data.room_id, renotify: true });
  n.onclick = () => { window.focus(); window.location.href = url; n.close(); };
}

function _flushBrowserNotification() {
  _nwTimer = null;
  if (!_nw || _nw.count === 0) { _nw = null; return; }
  dbg('[NOTIFY] flush', _nw.count, 'msgs,', _nw.rooms.size, 'rooms');
  let title, body, url;
  if (_nw.count === 1) {
    const s = _nw.firstSender, p = _nw.firstPreview;
    if (_nw.firstRoomType === 'meetup') { title = _nw.firstRoomName || 'Meetup'; body = s + ': ' + p; }
    else { title = '#' + (_nw.firstRoomName || 'Chat'); body = s + ': ' + p; }
    url = _nw.firstId ? '/chat/msg/' + _nw.firstId : '/chat/r/' + _nw.firstRoomId;
  } else if (_nw.rooms.size === 1) {
    const rname = _nw.firstRoomName || 'Chat';
    title = 'Chat';
    body = _nw.count + ' new messages in ' + (_nw.firstRoomType === 'meetup' ? rname : '#' + rname);
    url = _nw.firstId ? '/chat/msg/' + _nw.firstId : '/chat/r/' + _nw.firstRoomId;
  } else {
    title = 'Chat';
    body = _nw.count + ' new messages';
    url = '/chat';
  }
  const n = new Notification(title, { body, icon: '/favicon.png', tag: 'chat-all', renotify: true });
  n.onclick = () => { window.focus(); window.location.href = url; n.close(); };
  _nw = null;
}

async function _checkPushStatus() {
  dbg('[NOTIFY] checkPushStatus');
  try {
    if ('serviceWorker' in navigator && 'PushManager' in window) {
      const reg = await navigator.serviceWorker.ready;
      const sub = await reg.pushManager.getSubscription();
      _pushSubscribed = !!sub;
      dbg('[NOTIFY] push status:', _pushSubscribed);
    }
  } catch { _pushSubscribed = false; }
}

// Shared by _enableAllNotifications() (user-initiated, shows toasts) and
// _repairPushSubscription() (silent, on load) so the two paths cannot drift.
// Returns true only when the browser subscription AND the server POST both
// succeeded -- a rejected subscribe() (e.g. Brave with Google push services
// disabled) or a non-ok POST must both count as failure.
async function _subscribePush() {
  if (!('serviceWorker' in navigator && 'PushManager' in window)) return false;
  try {
    dbg('[NOTIFY] fetching vapid key');
    const vapidRes = await api('/push/vapid-key?_=' + Date.now());
    dbg('[NOTIFY] vapid key ok:', vapidRes.public_key?.slice(0, 20));
    const keyBytes = _urlBase64ToUint8Array(vapidRes.public_key);
    const reg = await navigator.serviceWorker.ready;
    dbg('[NOTIFY] sw ready');
    let sub = await reg.pushManager.getSubscription();
    if (sub) await sub.unsubscribe();
    sub = await reg.pushManager.subscribe({ userVisibleOnly: true, applicationServerKey: keyBytes });
    dbg('[NOTIFY] push manager subscribed');
    const subJson = sub.toJSON();
    const postRes = await fetch(API + '/push/subscribe', {
      method: 'POST', credentials: 'include',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({ endpoint: subJson.endpoint, keys: subJson.keys }),
    });
    dbg('[NOTIFY] subscribe POST', postRes.status);
    if (!postRes.ok) {
      dbg('[NOTIFY] subscribe POST failed, treating subscription as failed');
      return false;
    }
    dbg('[NOTIFY] push subscribed');
    return true;
  } catch (e) {
    dbg('[NOTIFY] push subscribe failed', e);
    return false;
  }
}

let _pushRepairAttempted = false;
async function _repairPushSubscription() {
  if (_pushRepairAttempted) return;
  _pushRepairAttempted = true;
  // Repair only restores a subscription the user explicitly enabled on this
  // device and never turned off -- without the flag gate, a user who disabled
  // notifications (permission stays granted) would be silently re-subscribed
  // on the next load.
  if (storageGet('push_enabled') !== '1') return;
  if (Notification.permission !== 'granted' || _pushSubscribed) return;
  dbg('[NOTIFY] repairing push subscription: permission granted, no active subscription');
  const subscribed = await _subscribePush();
  if (subscribed) {
    _pushSubscribed = true;
    dbg('[NOTIFY] push subscription repaired');
  } else {
    dbg('[NOTIFY] push subscription repair failed');
  }
}

function openNotificationsModal() {
  dbg('[NOTIFY] openNotificationsModal');
  const browserEnabled = Notification.permission === 'granted';
  const active = browserEnabled && _pushSubscribed;
  document.getElementById('notifications-modal')?.remove();
  const overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.id = 'notifications-modal';
  overlay.className = 'modal-overlay';
  overlay.innerHTML = `<div class="modal" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <span class="modal-title">Notifications</span>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeNotificationsModal()">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body" style="text-align:center">
      <p style="color:var(--color-muted);font-size:var(--font-sm);margin:0 0 12px 0">
        Get notified when new messages arrive in your DMs, meetups, and rooms.
      </p>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;align-items:center;font-size:var(--font-sm)">
        <div>In-app alerts: <span style="color:${browserEnabled ? '#4ade80' : 'var(--gray-400)'}">${browserEnabled ? 'On' : 'Off'}</span></div>
        <div>Push (app closed): <span style="color:${_pushSubscribed ? '#4ade80' : 'var(--gray-400)'}">${_pushSubscribed ? 'On' : 'Off'}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="modal-btn-primary" onclick="${active ? '_disableAllNotifications()' : '_enableAllNotifications()'}">${active ? 'Disable notifications' : 'Enable notifications'}</button>
    </div>
  </div>`;
  overlay.addEventListener('click', closeNotificationsModal);
  document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  requestAnimationFrame(() => overlay.classList.add('open'));
}

function closeNotificationsModal() {
  dbg('[NOTIFY] closeNotificationsModal');
  const el = document.getElementById('notifications-modal');
  if (el) { el.classList.remove('open'); setTimeout(() => el.remove(), 200); }
}

async function _enableAllNotifications() {
  dbg('[NOTIFY] enableAllNotifications');
  const perm = await Notification.requestPermission();
  if (perm !== 'granted') {
    showToast('Permission denied. Check browser settings.');
    closeNotificationsModal();
    return;
  }
  const subscribed = await _subscribePush();
  _pushSubscribed = subscribed;
  if (subscribed) {
    storageSet('push_enabled', '1');
    showToast('Notifications enabled');
  } else {
    dbg('[NOTIFY] push subscribe failed, falling back to in-app-only');
    showToast('In-app alerts enabled. Push registration failed - if you use Brave, enable "Use Google services for push messaging" in brave://settings/privacy and try again.');
  }
  closeNotificationsModal();
}

async function _disableAllNotifications() {
  dbg('[NOTIFY] disableAllNotifications');
  if ('serviceWorker' in navigator && 'PushManager' in window) {
    try {
      const reg = await navigator.serviceWorker.ready;
      const sub = await reg.pushManager.getSubscription();
      if (sub) {
        const endpoint = sub.endpoint;
        await sub.unsubscribe();
        await fetch(API + '/push/subscribe', {
          method: 'DELETE', credentials: 'include',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ endpoint }),
        });
        dbg('[NOTIFY] push unsubscribed');
      }
    } catch (e) {
      dbg('[NOTIFY] push unsubscribe failed', e);
    }
  }
  _pushSubscribed = false;
  storageRemove('push_enabled');
  showToast('Notifications disabled. Disable in-app alerts in browser settings.');
  closeNotificationsModal();
}

async function openBlockedUsersModal() {
  dbg('[BLOCK] openBlockedUsersModal');
  let list = [];
  try { list = await api('/blocks'); } catch {}
  document.getElementById('blocked-modal')?.remove();
  const overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.id = 'blocked-modal';
  overlay.className = 'modal-overlay';
  const items = list.length
    ? '<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column">' + list.map((u, i) => `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:var(--space-sm) 0${i < list.length - 1 ? ';border-bottom:1px solid var(--color-border)' : ''}">
        <div class="avatar-sm" style="background:var(--user-${(u.color_index || 0) % 12}-bg);width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:var(--font-xs);font-weight:700;color:var(--color-text);flex-shrink:0">${u.avatar_url ? `<img src="${esc(u.avatar_url)}" style="width:100%;height:100%;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover">` : (u.display_name || u.username || '?')[0].toUpperCase()}</div>

      </div>`).join('') + '</div>'
    : '<p style="color:var(--color-muted);text-align:center;font-size:var(--font-sm)">No blocked users</p>';
  overlay.innerHTML = `<div class="modal" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <span class="modal-title">Blocked Users</span>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="document.getElementById('blocked-modal').remove()">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">${items}</div>
  </div>`;
  overlay.addEventListener('click', () => overlay.remove());
  document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  requestAnimationFrame(() => overlay.classList.add('open'));
}

async function _unblockUser(userId, btn) {
  try {
    await api('/users/' + userId + '/block', { method: 'DELETE' });
    blockedUserIds.delete(userId);
    if (btn) {
      const row = btn.closest('div');
      const container = row.parentElement;
      row.remove();
      if (container && !container.children.length) {
        container.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--color-muted);text-align:center;font-size:var(--font-sm)">No blocked users</p>';
      }
    }
    renderMessages();
    renderMemberItems();
    _populateMenuSections();
    showToast('User unblocked');
  } catch (e) { showToast(e.message); }
}

function confirmLogout() {
  dbg('[AUTH] confirmLogout');
  closeActionSheet();
  const sheet = document.createElement('div');
  sheet.id = 'action-sheet';
  sheet.className = 'action-sheet-overlay';
  sheet.innerHTML = `<div class="action-sheet" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
    <div class="action-sheet-title">Log out?</div>
    <button class="action-sheet-btn action-sheet-danger" onclick="closeActionSheet();doLogout()">Log out</button>
    <button class="action-sheet-btn action-sheet-cancel" onclick="closeActionSheet()">Cancel</button>
  </div>`;
  sheet.addEventListener('click', closeActionSheet);
  document.body.appendChild(sheet);
  requestAnimationFrame(() => sheet.classList.add('open'));
}

async function doLogout() {
  dbg('[AUTH] doLogout');
  try {
    await api('/logout', { method: 'POST' });
  } catch (e) { dbg('[AUTH] logout request failed', e.message); }
  if (ws) { try { ws.close(); } catch (e) { /* already closed */ } ws = null; }
  currentUser = null;
  currentRoom = null;
  currentRoomName = null;
  currentRoomType = null;
  document.cookie = 'chat_session=; path=/; max-age=0';
  localStorage.removeItem('e2ee_keypair');
  localStorage.removeItem('e2ee_device_id');
  E2EE._keyPair = null;
  E2EE._deviceId = null;
  E2EE.available = true;
  E2EE._initialized = false;
  E2EE._deviceLists = {};
  E2EE._keks = {};
  E2EE._legacyPeerKeys = {};
  _roomEncrypted = new Set();
  _unencryptedRooms = new Set();
  _decryptRetried.clear();
  dbg('[E2EE] cleared key pair, device id, and caches on logout');
  renderAuth();
}

// --- Image viewer ---
function toggleVideo(wrap) {
  dbg('[VIDEO] toggleVideo');
  const vid = wrap.querySelector('video');
  if (vid.paused) { vid.play(); wrap.classList.add('playing'); }
  else { vid.pause(); wrap.classList.remove('playing'); }
}

let _expandedFromWrap = null;

function expandVideo(wrap, url) {
  dbg('[VIDEO] expandVideo', url);
  const vid = wrap.querySelector('video');
  const t = vid.currentTime;
  vid.pause();
  wrap.classList.remove('playing');
  _expandedFromWrap = wrap;
  openVideoViewer(url, t);
}

function closeViewer() {
  dbg('[VIEWER] closeViewer');
  const overlay = document.getElementById('image-viewer');
  if (!overlay) return;
  const viewerVid = overlay.querySelector('video');
  if (viewerVid && _expandedFromWrap) {
    const smallVid = _expandedFromWrap.querySelector('video');
    if (smallVid) smallVid.currentTime = viewerVid.currentTime;
  }
  viewerVid?.pause();
  _expandedFromWrap = null;
  overlay.classList.remove('open');
  setTimeout(() => overlay.remove(), 200);
}

// --- Helpers ---
function jss(s) { return esc(String(s).replace(/[`'\\]/g, '\\$&')); }
function _linkify(text) {
  return escapeHtml(text).replace(/(https?:\/\/[^\s<>"')\]]+)/g, '<a href="$1" target="_blank" rel="noopener" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">$1</a>');
}
// --- E2EE key management (multi-device v2) ---
const E2EE = {
  available: true,
  _keyPair: null,
  _deviceId: null,
  _initialized: false,

  async init() {
    try {
      if (!window.crypto || !window.crypto.subtle) {
        dbg('[E2EE] crypto.subtle unavailable');
        this.available = false;
        return;
      }
      const storedKp = localStorage.getItem('e2ee_keypair');
      const storedDeviceId = localStorage.getItem('e2ee_device_id');
      if (storedKp && storedDeviceId) {
        const kp = JSON.parse(storedKp);
        this._keyPair = {
          privateKey: await crypto.subtle.importKey(
            'jwk', kp.privateKey, {name: 'ECDH', namedCurve: 'P-256'}, true, ['deriveBits']
          ),
          publicKey: await crypto.subtle.importKey(
            'jwk', kp.publicKey, {name: 'ECDH', namedCurve: 'P-256'}, true, []
          ),
        };
        this._deviceId = storedDeviceId;
        dbg('[E2EE] loaded existing key pair + device id from localStorage');
      } else {
        const kp = await crypto.subtle.generateKey(
          {name: 'ECDH', namedCurve: 'P-256'}, true, ['deriveBits']
        );
        const privateJwk = await crypto.subtle.exportKey('jwk', kp.privateKey);
        const publicJwk = await crypto.subtle.exportKey('jwk', kp.publicKey);
        const deviceId = _genDeviceId();
        // Re-read before setItem to handle multi-tab race
        const raceKp = localStorage.getItem('e2ee_keypair');
        const raceDeviceId = localStorage.getItem('e2ee_device_id');
        if (raceKp && raceDeviceId) {
          const kp2 = JSON.parse(raceKp);
          this._keyPair = {
            privateKey: await crypto.subtle.importKey(
              'jwk', kp2.privateKey, {name: 'ECDH', namedCurve: 'P-256'}, true, ['deriveBits']
            ),
            publicKey: await crypto.subtle.importKey(
              'jwk', kp2.publicKey, {name: 'ECDH', namedCurve: 'P-256'}, true, []
            ),
          };
          this._deviceId = raceDeviceId;
          dbg('[E2EE] adopted key pair + device id from another tab (race)');
        } else {
          // Write device_id first, keypair second: a losing tab adopts on the
          // keypair storage event, and by then both keys are readable atomically.
          localStorage.setItem('e2ee_device_id', deviceId);
          localStorage.setItem('e2ee_keypair', JSON.stringify({privateKey: privateJwk, publicKey: publicJwk}));
          this._keyPair = kp;
          this._deviceId = deviceId;
          dbg('[E2EE] generated new key pair + device id', deviceId);
        }
      }
      this.available = true;
    } catch (e) {
      dbg('[E2EE] init failed:', e && e.message);
      this.available = false;
    }
  },

  async getPublicKeyJwk() {
    if (!this._keyPair) return null;
    try {
      return JSON.stringify(await crypto.subtle.exportKey('jwk', this._keyPair.publicKey));
    } catch (e) {
      dbg('[E2EE] getPublicKeyJwk failed:', e && e.message);
      return null;
    }
  },

  async uploadPublicKey() {
    if (!this.available || !this._keyPair || !this._deviceId) return;
    const jwk = await this.getPublicKeyJwk();
    if (!jwk) return;
    let attempt = 0;
    while (attempt < 3) {
      try {
        const res = await fetch('/chat/api/keys', {
          method: 'PUT',
          headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
          credentials: 'same-origin',
          body: JSON.stringify({device_id: this._deviceId, public_key: jwk}),
        });
        if (res.ok) {
          dbg('[E2EE] public key uploaded (attempt ' + (attempt + 1) + '), device=' + this._deviceId);
          return;
        }
        throw new Error('HTTP ' + res.status);
      } catch (e) {
        attempt++;
        dbg('[E2EE] upload attempt ' + attempt + ' failed:', e && e.message);
        if (attempt < 3) await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 2000); });
      }
    }
    dbg('[E2EE] all upload attempts failed');
    showToast('Encryption setup failed', 15000);
    this.available = false;
  },

  // --- Multi-device (v2): per-peer-device KEKs wrapping a per-message key ---
  _deviceLists: {},
  _keks: {},
  // Retained only for the v1 backward-compat decrypt path below -- never
  // populated by any fetch in v2 code, see _decryptV1Legacy in the docs.
  _legacyPeerKeys: {},

  async _deriveKek(devicePublicKey, roomId) {
    const bits = await crypto.subtle.deriveBits(
      {name: 'ECDH', public: devicePublicKey},
      this._keyPair.privateKey,
      256
    );
    const hkdfKey = await crypto.subtle.importKey('raw', bits, 'HKDF', false, ['deriveKey']);
    const enc = new TextEncoder();
    return crypto.subtle.deriveKey(
      {name: 'HKDF', hash: 'SHA-256', salt: enc.encode(roomId), info: enc.encode('e2ee-dm-v2')},
      hkdfKey,
      {name: 'AES-GCM', length: 256},
      false,
      ['encrypt', 'decrypt']
    );
  },

  // Retained verbatim from v1 -- used ONLY by the legacy decrypt path, which
  // never fetches (see _decryptV1Legacy).
  async _deriveSharedKeyV1(peerPublicKey, roomId) {
    const bits = await crypto.subtle.deriveBits(
      {name: 'ECDH', public: peerPublicKey},
      this._keyPair.privateKey,
      256
    );
    const hkdfKey = await crypto.subtle.importKey('raw', bits, 'HKDF', false, ['deriveKey']);
    const enc = new TextEncoder();
    return crypto.subtle.deriveKey(
      {name: 'HKDF', hash: 'SHA-256', salt: enc.encode(roomId), info: enc.encode('e2ee-dm-v1')},
      hkdfKey,
      {name: 'AES-GCM', length: 256},
      false,
      ['encrypt', 'decrypt']
    );
  },

  async _fetchDeviceList(userId) {
    const res = await fetch('/chat/api/keys/' + userId, {credentials: 'same-origin'});
    if (res.status === 404) {
      dbg('[E2EE] no device keys for user', userId);
      return null;
    }
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error('device list fetch failed: HTTP ' + res.status);
    const data = await res.json();
    const devices = [];
    for (const d of data.devices) {
      try {
        const jwk = JSON.parse(d.public_key);
        const publicKey = await crypto.subtle.importKey('jwk', jwk, {name: 'ECDH', namedCurve: 'P-256'}, true, []);
        devices.push({device_id: d.device_id, publicKey});
      } catch (e) {
        dbg('[E2EE] skipping unimportable device key', d.device_id, e && e.message);
      }
    }
    return devices;
  },

  async getDeviceList(userId) {
    if (this._deviceLists[userId]) return this._deviceLists[userId];
    const p = this._fetchDeviceList(userId);
    this._deviceLists[userId] = p;
    try {
      const devices = await p;
      if (devices === null) delete this._deviceLists[userId];
      return devices;
    } catch (e) {
      delete this._deviceLists[userId];
      throw e;
    }
  },

  async getKek(roomId, userId, deviceId, devicePublicKey) {
    const cacheKey = roomId + ':' + userId + ':' + deviceId;
    if (this._keks[cacheKey]) return this._keks[cacheKey];
    const p = this._deriveKek(devicePublicKey, roomId);
    this._keks[cacheKey] = p;
    try {
      return await p;
    } catch (e) {
      delete this._keks[cacheKey];
      throw e;
    }
  },

  // Returns the complete envelope JSON string (caller uses it directly as
  // outgoingContent), or null if the peer has no device key at all.
  async encrypt(roomId, peerUserId, plaintext) {
    const peerDevices = await this.getDeviceList(peerUserId);
    if (peerDevices === null) return null;
    let ownDevices = await this.getDeviceList(currentUser.id);
    if (ownDevices === null) ownDevices = [];
    // Self-readability must never race the upload: if the fetched list is
    // missing this device (upload hasn't landed yet), add it locally.
    if (!ownDevices.some(d => d.device_id === this._deviceId)) {
      ownDevices = ownDevices.concat([{device_id: this._deviceId, publicKey: this._keyPair.publicKey}]);
    }

    const mk = crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(32));
    const mkKey = await crypto.subtle.importKey('raw', mk, {name: 'AES-GCM'}, false, ['encrypt']);
    const iv1 = crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(12));
    const enc = new TextEncoder();
    const ctBuf = await crypto.subtle.encrypt({name: 'AES-GCM', iv: iv1}, mkKey, enc.encode(plaintext));
    const ct = _b64FromParts(iv1, new Uint8Array(ctBuf));

    const keys = {};
    const wrapAll = async (userId, devices) => {
      for (const device of devices) {
        try {
          const kek = await this.getKek(roomId, userId, device.device_id, device.publicKey);
          const ivD = crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(12));
          const wrappedBuf = await crypto.subtle.encrypt({name: 'AES-GCM', iv: ivD}, kek, mk);
          keys[device.device_id] = _b64FromParts(ivD, new Uint8Array(wrappedBuf));
        } catch (e) {
          // A corrupt stored JWK for one device must not block the whole send.
          dbg('[E2EE] failed to wrap message key for device', device.device_id, e && e.message);
        }
      }
    };
    await wrapAll(peerUserId, peerDevices);
    await wrapAll(currentUser.id, ownDevices);

    return JSON.stringify({ e2ee: true, v: 2, sd: this._deviceId, ct, keys });
  },
};

window.addEventListener('storage', function(e) {
  if (e.key !== 'e2ee_keypair') return;
  dbg('[E2EE] e2ee_keypair changed in another tab');
  if (!e.newValue) return;
  try {
    const kp = JSON.parse(e.newValue);

    // this tab observes the keypair storage event, device_id is already
    // committed and readable here.
    const deviceId = localStorage.getItem('e2ee_device_id');

      crypto.subtle.importKey('jwk', kp.privateKey, {name: 'ECDH', namedCurve: 'P-256'}, true, ['deriveBits']),
      crypto.subtle.importKey('jwk', kp.publicKey, {name: 'ECDH', namedCurve: 'P-256'}, true, []),
    ]).then(function(keys) {
      E2EE._keyPair = {privateKey: keys[0], publicKey: keys[1]};
      E2EE._deviceId = deviceId;
      // Device identity changed -- every cached device list and derived
      // KEK is suspect.
      E2EE._deviceLists = {};
      E2EE._keks = {};
      dbg('[E2EE] re-imported key pair + device id from storage event, cleared device list/kek caches');
    }).catch(function(err) {
      dbg('[E2EE] storage event re-import failed:', err && err.message);
    });
  } catch (err) {
    dbg('[E2EE] storage event parse failed:', err && err.message);
  }
});

// --- Router ---
let _routing = false;
async function route() {
  if (_routing) { dbg('route: skip (already routing)'); return; }
  _routing = true;
  try {
  if (!_siteShort) {
    try {
      const cfg = await api('/config');
      _googleClientId = cfg.google_client_id;
      _siteShort = cfg.site_short;
      if (cfg.msg_char_limit) _msgCharLimit = cfg.msg_char_limit;
      if (_siteShort) document.title = 'Chat · ' + _siteShort;
      dbg('[CONFIG] loaded, site_short:', _siteShort, 'msg_char_limit:', _msgCharLimit);
    } catch (e) { dbg('[CONFIG] fetch failed:', e.message); }
  }
  dbg('route:', location.href);
  const path = location.pathname;
  const pathRoom = path.match(/\/chat\/r\/(.+)/)?.[1] || null;
  const pathDm = path.match(/\/chat\/d\/(.+)/)?.[1] || null;
  const pathMeetup = path.match(/\/chat\/m\/(.+)/)?.[1] || null;
  const pathMsg = path.match(/\/chat\/msg\/(.+)/)?.[1] || null;
  const targetRoom = pathRoom || pathDm || pathMeetup || null;
  dbg('route:', pathRoom ? 'room=' + pathRoom : pathDm ? 'dm=' + pathDm : pathMeetup ? 'meetup=' + pathMeetup : pathMsg ? 'msg=' + pathMsg : '(main)');

  if (targetRoom && currentRoom === targetRoom && currentRoomName) return;

  const authed = await checkAuth();
  if (!authed) { await renderAuth(); return; }
  if (!currentUser.username || !currentUser.country || !currentUser.avatar_url) { renderProfilePrompt(); return; }
  await _checkPushStatus();
  await _repairPushSubscription();
  if (!ws || ws.readyState !== 1) await connectWS();
  if (!E2EE._initialized && currentUser) {
    E2EE._initialized = true;
    E2EE.init().then(function() { return E2EE.uploadPublicKey(); }).catch(function(e) { dbg('[E2EE] setup error:', e && e.message); });
  }
  await loadBlockedUsers();
  await loadRooms();

  if (pathMsg) {
    try {
      dbg('[NAV] resolving message', pathMsg);
      const ctx = await api('/messages/' + pathMsg);
      window._pendingScrollMsg = pathMsg;
      await openRoom(ctx.room_id, ctx.room_name, ctx.room_type);
      history.replaceState(null, '', '/chat/r/' + ctx.room_id);
    } catch (e) {
      dbg('[NAV] message not found:', e.message);
      showToast('Message no longer available');
      if (rooms.length === 1) openRoom(rooms[0].id, rooms[0].name, rooms[0].type);
      else renderRoomList();
      history.replaceState(null, '', '/chat');
    }
  } else if (targetRoom) {
    const roomId = targetRoom;
    const room = rooms.find(r => r.id === roomId);
    let roomName = room ? room.name : currentRoomName || null;
    let roomType = room ? room.type : currentRoomType || 'stage';
    if (!roomName) {
      try {
        const info = await api('/rooms/' + roomId + '/info');
        roomName = info.name;
        roomType = info.type;
      } catch { roomName = 'Chat'; }
    }
    openRoom(roomId, roomName, roomType);
  } else if (rooms.length === 1) {
    openRoom(rooms[0].id, rooms[0].name, rooms[0].type);
  } else {
    const main = rooms.find(r => r.is_main) || rooms[0];
    if (main) openRoom(main.id, main.name, main.type);

  }
  } catch (e) {
    console.error('Route error:', e);

  }

window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
  const wasMobile = isMobile;
  isMobile = window.innerWidth < 768;
  if (wasMobile !== isMobile) {
    _routing = false;
    if (currentRoom) {
      openRoom(currentRoom, currentRoomName, currentRoomType);
    } else {
      renderRoomList();
    }
  }
});
window.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {

});
document.addEventListener('gesturestart', e => e.preventDefault());
document.addEventListener('touchmove', e => { if (e.touches.length > 1) e.preventDefault(); }, { passive: false });
document.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e) => { if (!e.target.closest('.msg')) e.preventDefault(); });

function _checkPushNavigate() {

  }).catch(function() {});
}
function _pushNavRetry() {
  _checkPushNavigate();
  setTimeout(_checkPushNavigate, 300);
  setTimeout(_checkPushNavigate, 1000);
}
window.addEventListener('focus', _pushNavRetry);
window.addEventListener('pageshow', _pushNavRetry);
document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => {
  if (!document.hidden) {
    dbg('[NOTIFY] tab visible');
    _pushNavRetry();
    _hiddenUnread = 0;
    _nw = null;
    if (_nwTimer) { clearTimeout(_nwTimer); _nwTimer = null; }
    _updateTitleBadge();
    if (_hiddenUnread > 0 && currentRoom) { renderMessages(); scrollToBottom(); }
    _setupReadObserver();
  } else {
    _flushMarkRead();
  }
});
route();
function _plog(step, detail) {
  try { fetch('/chat/api/swlog', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ src: 'chat', step: step, detail: detail || null }) }).catch(function() {}); } catch (e) {}
}
if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {
  navigator.serviceWorker.register('/sw.js').catch(function() {});

}

function _startVisibleKeepalive() {
  if (_visibleInterval || document.hidden) return;

    if (ws && ws.readyState === 1) wsSend('visible', {});

  if (!('serviceWorker' in navigator) || !navigator.serviceWorker.controller) return;
  navigator.serviceWorker.ready.then(function(reg) {

      if (roomNotifs.length > 0) {
        setTimeout(function() {
          if (currentRoom !== roomId) return;
          reg.getNotifications().then(function(list2) {

    requestAnimationFrame(() => {

        var h = vv.height;
        if (h < 200) return;
        if (!_baseH || h > _baseH) _baseH = h;

        if (h < _baseH * 0.75) {

.messages { padding: var(--space-lg) var(--space-md) var(--space-sm); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; min-height: 100%; justify-content: flex-end; -webkit-user-select: none; user-select: none; -webkit-touch-callout: none; }

.msg-video-wrap { position: relative; display: inline-block; margin-top: var(--space-xs); cursor: pointer; }
.msg-video { max-width: 260px; max-height: 260px; border-radius: var(--radius-md); display: block; -webkit-touch-callout: none; }
.msg-video-play { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%,-50%); width: 48px; height: 48px; color: #fff; filter: drop-shadow(0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)); pointer-events: none; transition: opacity 0.15s; }
.msg-video-wrap.playing .msg-video-play { opacity: 0; }
.msg-video-fullscreen { position: absolute; bottom: var(--space-md); right: var(--space-md); width: 22px; height: 22px; color: #fff; filter: drop-shadow(0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.7)); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.15s; cursor: pointer; }
.msg-video-wrap.playing .msg-video-fullscreen { opacity: 0.8; }
.msg-pending { opacity: 0.5; }

/* --- Message cards (meetup + location) --- */
.msg-card { background: var(--color-surface); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: var(--space-md); margin-top: var(--space-xs); width: 260px; display: block; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; cursor: pointer; }
.msg-card:active { background: var(--color-surface-hover); }
.msg-card .card-label { font-size: var(--font-xs); color: var(--color-accent); font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: var(--space-xs); }
.msg-card .card-title { font-weight: 600; font-size: var(--font-sm); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.msg-card .card-meta { font-size: var(--font-xs); color: var(--color-muted); margin-top: var(--space-xs); }
.msg-card.card-meetup { background: var(--user-1-bg); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--color-accent); }
.meetup-join { display: inline-block; padding: var(--space-xs) var(--space-md); border: 1px solid var(--color-accent); border-radius: var(--radius-pill); font-size: var(--font-xs); font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; background: none; color: var(--color-accent); font-family: inherit; margin-top: var(--space-sm); }
.meetup-join.joined { background: var(--color-accent); color: #fff; }
.meetup-going { font-weight: 400; }
.meetup-join-wide { width: 260px; display: block; margin-top: var(--space-xs); padding: var(--space-sm) var(--space-md); border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: var(--font-sm); }
.msg-card.card-location { background: var(--user-5-bg); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--color-success); }
.msg-card.card-location .card-label { color: var(--color-success); }

/* --- Link preview --- */
.msg-link-preview { display: block; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; margin-bottom: var(--space-sm); border-radius: var(--radius-md); overflow: hidden; background: var(--color-surface); max-width: 480px; cursor: pointer; }
.msg-link-preview:active { opacity: 0.85; }
.link-preview-img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: auto; display: block; -webkit-touch-callout: none; }
.link-preview-body { padding: 10px var(--space-md); }
.link-preview-title { font-weight: 600; font-size: var(--font-sm); line-height: 1.3; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.link-preview-desc { font-size: var(--font-xs); color: var(--color-muted); margin-top: var(--space-xs); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; line-height: 1.4; }
.link-preview-domain { font-size: var(--font-xs); color: var(--color-muted); margin-top: 3px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }

/* --- Input bar --- */
.input-bar { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: var(--space-xs); padding: var(--space-sm) var(--space-md); border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border); background: var(--color-bg); flex-shrink: 0; position: relative; }
.pwa-standalone .input-bar { padding-bottom: 20px; }
.input-bar button { background: none; border: none; padding: 0; cursor: pointer; color: var(--color-text-secondary); width: 32px; height: 32px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.input-bar button svg { width: 24px; height: 24px; }
.input-wrap { flex: 1; position: relative; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; }
.input-wrap textarea { width: 100%; padding: 10px 44px 10px var(--space-lg); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: 20px; font-size: var(--font-base); outline: none; font-family: inherit; resize: none; overflow-y: hidden; line-height: 1.4; box-sizing: content-box; scrollbar-width: none; }
.input-wrap textarea:focus { border-color: var(--gray-400); }
.input-wrap textarea.overlimit { border-color: #e53935; }
.input-wrap textarea.overlimit:focus { border-color: #e53935; }
.input-bar .send.disabled { opacity: 0.3; pointer-events: none; }
.input-wrap textarea::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
.input-wrap textarea.multiline { border-radius: var(--radius-lg); }
.input-bar .emoji-btn { position: absolute; right: 10px; bottom: 9px; width: 22px; height: 22px; padding: 0; background: none; border: none; color: var(--color-disabled); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 0; }
.input-bar .emoji-btn svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; }
.input-bar .send { color: var(--color-text-secondary); }
.input-bar .send svg { width: 28px; height: 28px; }

/* --- Action menu popup --- */
.action-menu { display: none; position: absolute; bottom: 100%; left: var(--space-sm); margin-bottom: var(--space-xs); background: var(--color-bg); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); z-index: 50; overflow: hidden; }
.action-menu.open { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.action-menu button { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-md); padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-xl); border: none; background: none; font-size: var(--font-sm); cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; text-align: left; font-family: inherit; width: 100%; height: auto; color: var(--color-text); justify-content: flex-start; }
.action-menu button:active { background: var(--color-surface); }
@media (hover: hover) { .action-menu button:hover { background: var(--color-surface); } }

/* --- Reply preview --- */
.reply-preview { display: none; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-sm); padding: var(--space-sm) var(--space-md); border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border); background: var(--color-surface); flex-shrink: 0; }
.reply-preview.visible { display: flex; }
.reply-preview-content { flex: 1; min-width: 0; border-left: 3px solid var(--color-accent); padding-left: var(--space-sm); }
.reply-preview-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: var(--font-xs); display: block; margin-bottom: 2px; }
.reply-preview-text { font-size: var(--font-sm); line-height: 1.4; color: var(--color-muted); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: block; }
.reply-preview-close { background: none; border: none; font-size: 18px; color: var(--color-muted); cursor: pointer; padding: var(--space-xs) var(--space-sm); }

/* --- Reply quote in message --- */
.reply-quote { border-left: 3px solid var(--color-accent); padding: var(--space-xs) var(--space-sm); margin: 6px 0; cursor: pointer; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.04); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); }
.msg-mine-bubble .reply-quote { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.06); }
.reply-quote-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: var(--font-xs); display: block; margin-bottom: 2px; }
.reply-quote-text { font-size: var(--font-sm); line-height: 1.4; color: var(--color-muted); display: block; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; max-width: 200px; }
.msg.highlight { animation: msg-highlight 1.5s ease-out; }
@keyframes msg-highlight { 0% { background: rgba(185,28,28,0.1); } 100% { background: transparent; } }

/* --- Reactions --- */
.reaction-pills { position: absolute; bottom: -16px; display: flex; gap: 3px; z-index: 5; }
.msg-mine-bubble .reaction-pills { right: var(--space-sm); }
.msg-other-bubble .reaction-pills { left: var(--space-sm); }
.reaction-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 2px; padding: var(--space-xs) var(--space-sm); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-pill); background: var(--color-surface); font-size: var(--font-sm); cursor: pointer; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); line-height: 1; text-align: center; }
.reaction-pill.own { border-color: var(--color-accent); }
.react-btn { opacity: 0; position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); background: var(--color-bg); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: 50%; width: 30px; height: 30px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; z-index: var(--z-sticky); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); transition: opacity var(--transition-fast); color: var(--color-text-secondary); }
.react-btn svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; }
@media (hover: hover) { .msg-bubble:hover .react-btn { opacity: 1; } }
.react-btn.active { opacity: 1; }
.msg-other-bubble .react-btn { left: auto; right: -38px; }
.msg-mine-bubble .react-btn { right: auto; left: -38px; }
.msg-bubble::after { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 88px; }
.msg-other-bubble::after { right: -88px; }
.msg-mine-bubble::after { left: -88px; }
.reaction-picker { display: flex; gap: 2px; background: var(--color-bg); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-pill); padding: var(--space-xs) 6px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); position: fixed; z-index: var(--z-toast); white-space: nowrap; }
.reaction-picker button { background: none; border: none; font-size: var(--font-xl); padding: var(--space-xs) 6px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 50%; }
@media (hover: hover) { .reaction-picker button:hover { background: var(--color-surface); } }

/* --- Action sheet (mobile bottom drawer / desktop centered modal) --- */
.action-sheet-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); z-index: var(--z-popup); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s; -webkit-user-select: none; user-select: none; -webkit-touch-callout: none; }
.action-sheet-overlay.open { opacity: 1; }
.action-sheet { background: var(--color-bg); width: 90%; max-width: 360px; border-radius: var(--radius-lg); padding: var(--space-sm) 0 0; transform: scale(0.95); opacity: 0; transition: transform 0.2s, opacity 0.2s; -webkit-user-select: none; user-select: none; overflow: hidden; }
.action-sheet > :last-child { padding-bottom: calc(var(--space-md) + var(--space-sm)); }
.action-sheet-overlay.open .action-sheet { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
.action-sheet-title { text-align: center; font-weight: 600; font-size: var(--font-base); color: var(--color-muted); padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-lg); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border); }
.action-sheet-desc { text-align: center; font-size: var(--font-sm); color: var(--color-muted); padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-lg); margin: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border); }
.action-sheet-btn { display: block; width: 100%; padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-lg); border: none; background: none; font-size: var(--font-base); cursor: pointer; text-align: center; font-family: inherit; color: var(--color-text); }
@media (hover: hover) { .action-sheet-btn:active { background: var(--color-surface); } }
.action-sheet-danger { color: var(--color-accent); }
.action-sheet-cancel { color: var(--color-muted); border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border); margin-top: var(--space-xs); }

/* --- Image/video viewer --- */
.image-viewer { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.9); z-index: var(--z-toast); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s; }
.image-viewer.open { opacity: 1; }
.image-viewer img { max-width: 90%; max-height: 90%; object-fit: contain; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); }
.viewer-close { position: absolute; top: var(--space-md); right: var(--space-md); width: 32px; height: 32px; filter: drop-shadow(0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)); opacity: 0.8; cursor: pointer; }

/* --- Video trim editor --- */
.trim-editor video { width: 100%; border-radius: 0; display: block; background: #000; }
.trim-controls { padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-lg); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: var(--space-sm); }
.trim-track { position: relative; height: 32px; background: var(--color-surface); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); cursor: pointer; }
.trim-range { position: absolute; top: 0; height: 100%; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.12); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); }
.trim-handle { position: absolute; top: 0; width: 12px; height: 100%; background: var(--color-text); border-radius: 3px; cursor: ew-resize; z-index: 2; }
.trim-handle::after { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%,-50%); width: 2px; height: 12px; background: #fff; border-radius: 1px; }
.trim-playhead { position: absolute; top: 0; width: 2px; height: 100%; background: var(--color-accent); z-index: 1; pointer-events: none; }
.trim-times { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: var(--font-xs); color: var(--color-muted); }
.trim-duration { text-align: center; font-size: var(--font-sm); font-weight: 600; }

/* --- Modal --- */
.modal-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); z-index: var(--z-popup); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s; }
.modal-overlay.open { opacity: 1; }
.modal { background: var(--color-bg); width: calc(100% - var(--space-2xl)); max-width: 400px; border-radius: var(--radius-lg); overflow: visible; transform: scale(0.95); transition: transform 0.2s; }
.modal-overlay.open .modal { transform: scale(1); }
.modal-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-lg); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border); }
.modal-title { font-weight: 600; font-size: var(--font-base); }
.modal-close { background: none; border: none; font-size: 22px; cursor: pointer; padding: var(--space-xs) var(--space-sm); color: var(--color-muted); }
.modal-body { padding: var(--space-lg); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: var(--space-sm); }
.modal-label { font-size: var(--font-xs); font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-muted); margin-top: var(--space-xs); }
.modal-input { padding: var(--space-md); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: var(--font-sm); outline: none; width: 100%; font-family: inherit; }
.modal-input:focus { border-color: var(--gray-400); }
.modal-textarea { padding: var(--space-md); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: var(--font-sm); outline: none; resize: vertical; width: 100%; font-family: inherit; }
.modal-footer { padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-lg); border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border); }
.modal-btn-primary { width: 100%; padding: var(--space-md); background: var(--gray-900); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: var(--font-base); cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; font-family: inherit; }
.modal-btn-secondary { padding: var(--space-md); background: var(--color-surface); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: var(--font-sm); cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; font-family: inherit; }

/* --- Auth screen --- */
.auth-screen { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: var(--space-lg); padding: var(--space-2xl); flex: 1; }
.auth-screen h2 { margin: 0 0 var(--space-sm); font-size: var(--font-xl); }
.auth-screen p { margin: 0; color: var(--color-muted); font-size: var(--font-sm); text-align: center; }
.auth-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: var(--space-md); width: 280px; padding: var(--space-md); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); background: var(--color-bg); font-size: var(--font-base); cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; }
.auth-btn:active { background: var(--color-surface); }
.auth-input { width: 280px; padding: var(--space-md); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: var(--font-base); outline: none; text-align: center; font-family: inherit; }
.auth-input:focus { border-color: var(--gray-400); }

/* --- Profile prompt --- */
.profile-prompt { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-lg); padding: var(--space-2xl); flex: 1; justify-content: center; }
.profile-prompt h2 { margin: 0; font-size: var(--font-xl); }
.profile-field { width: 320px; position: relative; }
.profile-field input { width: 100%; padding: var(--space-md); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: var(--font-base); text-align: center; outline: none; font-family: inherit; transition: border-color 0.15s; }
.profile-field input:focus { border-color: var(--gray-400); }
.profile-field input.valid, .profile-field input.valid:focus { border-color: var(--color-success); }
.profile-field .field-status { position: absolute; right: var(--space-md); top: 0; height: 46px; display: flex; align-items: center; font-size: var(--font-xs); }
.profile-field .field-status.ok { color: var(--color-success); }
.profile-field .field-status.err { color: var(--color-accent); }
.profile-field .field-hint { font-size: var(--font-xs); color: var(--color-muted); text-align: center; margin-top: var(--space-xs); min-height: 1.3em; text-wrap: balance; }
.profile-field .field-hint.err { color: var(--color-accent); }
.profile-preview { width: 320px; background: var(--gray-50); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: var(--space-lg); }
.profile-preview .msg-bubble { max-width: 90%; }
.profile-preview-label { font-size: var(--font-xs); color: var(--color-muted); margin-bottom: var(--space-sm); text-align: center; }
.country-picker { position: relative; width: 320px; }
.country-picker input { width: 100%; padding: var(--space-md); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: var(--font-base); outline: none; font-family: inherit; text-align: center; transition: border-color 0.15s; }
.country-picker input:focus { border-color: var(--gray-400); }
.country-picker input.valid, .country-picker input.valid:focus { border-color: var(--color-success); }
.country-picker > .field-status { position: absolute; right: var(--space-md); top: 0; height: 46px; display: flex; align-items: center; font-size: var(--font-xs); z-index: 1; }
.country-picker .field-status.ok { color: var(--color-success); }
.country-list { position: absolute; top: 100%; left: 0; right: 0; max-height: 200px; overflow-y: auto; background: var(--color-bg); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-top: none; border-radius: 0 0 var(--radius-md) var(--radius-md); z-index: 50; display: none; scrollbar-width: none; }
.country-list::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
.country-picker.open .country-list { display: block; }
.country-item { padding: var(--space-md); cursor: pointer; font-size: var(--font-sm); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-sm); }
.country-item:hover, .country-item.highlighted { background: var(--color-surface); }
.country-item .flag { font-size: 18px; }
.profile-prompt button { width: 320px; padding: var(--space-md); background: var(--gray-900); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: var(--font-base); cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; font-family: inherit; }
.avatar-upload { width: 128px; height: 128px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color-surface); border: 2px dashed var(--color-border); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; overflow: hidden; position: relative; }
.avatar-upload img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
.avatar-upload svg { width: 32px; height: 32px; color: var(--color-disabled); }
.avatar-edit { width: 128px; height: 128px; border-radius: 50%; overflow: hidden; position: relative; touch-action: none; }
.avatar-edit img { position: absolute; user-select: none; -webkit-user-drag: none; will-change: transform; }
.avatar-zoom { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-xs); justify-content: center; align-self: center; }
.avatar-zoom-track { width: 96px; height: 1px; background: var(--color-border); border-radius: 1px; position: relative; }
.avatar-zoom-thumb { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--gray-400); position: absolute; top: -4.5px; transition: none; }
.avatar-zoom-thumb.hidden { opacity: 0; }
.avatar-zoom span { color: var(--color-disabled); font-size: var(--font-xs); position: relative; top: -1px; }

/* --- Unread badges --- */
.unread-badge { min-width: 18px; padding: 3px 6px; background: var(--color-accent); color: #fff; border-radius: var(--radius-pill); font-size: var(--font-2xs); font-weight: 700; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; line-height: 1; box-sizing: border-box; text-align: center; }
.tab-dot { display: none; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color-accent); margin-left: 6px; vertical-align: middle; position: relative; top: -1px; }
.tab-dot.active { display: inline-block; }

/* --- Hamburger menu (mobile) --- */
.hamburger-dot { display: none; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color-accent); position: absolute; top: 10px; right: 8px; }
.hamburger-dot.active { display: block; }
.chat-menu { display: none; }

/* --- Empty state --- */
.empty { text-align: center; padding: var(--space-2xl) var(--space-xl); color: var(--color-muted); font-size: var(--font-sm); }

/* --- Typing --- */
.typing-indicator { padding: var(--space-xs) var(--space-lg); font-size: var(--font-xs); color: var(--color-muted); font-style: italic; min-height: 20px; }

.member-blocked { opacity: 0.4; }

/* ===== MEDIA QUERIES ===== */

/* --- Desktop --- */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .app { flex-direction: row; }
  .sidebar { width: 320px; border-right: 1px solid var(--color-border); display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100vh; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .sidebar .content { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; min-height: 0; }
  .main-panel { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100vh; }
  .main-panel .header { display: flex; }
  .header .header-info { padding-left: 0; }
  .room-item.active { background: var(--color-surface); }
  .member-list { flex: 1; min-height: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border); }
  .member-tabs { display: flex; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 var(--color-border); background: var(--color-bg); height: var(--header-h); flex-shrink: 0; }
  .member-tabs button { flex: 1; background: none; border: none; font-size: var(--font-sm); color: var(--color-muted); cursor: pointer; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; font-family: inherit; }
  .member-tabs button.active { color: var(--color-text); font-weight: 600; border-bottom-color: var(--color-text); }
  .member-list-items { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; scrollbar-width: none; }
  .member-list-items::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .member-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-sm); padding: 0 var(--space-lg); height: 40px; cursor: pointer; }
  .member-item .avatar-sm { width: 26px; height: 26px; font-size: 11px; }
  .member-item:hover { background: var(--color-surface); }
  .member-item-self { background: var(--color-surface); }
  .member-item-self:hover { background: var(--color-surface-hover); }
  .member-item .avatar-sm { position: relative; }
  .member-name { font-size: var(--font-sm); color: var(--color-text); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
  .member-flag { font-size: var(--font-sm); flex-shrink: 0; margin-left: auto; }
}
@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .sidebar { display: none; }
  .sidebar.visible { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; }
  .main-panel { display: none; }
  .main-panel.visible { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; }
  .input-bar { padding: var(--space-sm) calc((var(--header-h) - 32px) / 2); }
  .input-wrap textarea { padding: var(--space-sm) 44px var(--space-sm) var(--space-lg); }
  .nav-icon { display: flex; }
  .hamburger { display: flex; }
  .header-count { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-xs); font-size: var(--font-xs); color: #fff; position: absolute; right: var(--header-h); top: 0; height: var(--header-h); }
  .header .header-info { padding-right: calc(var(--header-h) + 36px); }
  .react-btn { opacity: 1; width: 24px; height: 24px; }
  .react-btn svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }
  .chat-menu { position: fixed; top: var(--header-h); left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; z-index: var(--z-menu); background: var(--gray-900); flex-direction: column; overflow-y: auto; scrollbar-width: none; -ms-overflow-style: none; }
  .chat-menu::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .chat-menu.open { display: flex; }
  .menu-section { background: none; color: #ccc; border: none; border-top: 1px solid var(--gray-700); padding: 14px var(--space-lg); font-size: 15px; text-align: left; font-family: inherit; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-sm); width: 100%; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; }
  .menu-section .menu-arrow { margin-left: auto; width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .menu-section .arrow-down { display: none; }
  .menu-section .arrow-right { display: block; }
  .menu-section.expanded .arrow-down { display: block; }
  .menu-section.expanded .arrow-right { display: none; }
  .menu-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color-accent); display: none; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .menu-dot.active { display: inline-block; }
  .menu-items { display: none; background: var(--gray-800); }
  .menu-items.open { display: block; }
  .menu-items .room-item { padding: var(--space-sm) var(--space-lg); border-bottom-color: var(--gray-700); }
  .menu-items .room-item.active { background: var(--gray-700); }
  .menu-items .room-item .room-name { color: #fff; }
  .menu-items .room-item .room-count { display: none; }
  .menu-items .room-item .room-desc { display: block; font-size: var(--font-xs); color: var(--gray-400); line-height: 1.2; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
  .menu-items .room-member-icon { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-xs); font-size: var(--font-xs); color: #fff; flex-shrink: 0; order: 3; }
  .menu-items .room-badge { order: 2; }
  .menu-items .room-bell { order: 4; }
  .menu-items .room-bell.active { color: #fff; }
  .menu-member { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-sm); padding: 0 var(--space-xl); height: 40px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--gray-800); }
  .menu-member:active:not(:has(:active)) { background: var(--gray-700); }
  .menu-member-self { background: var(--gray-700); }
  .menu-member .avatar-sm { width: 26px; height: 26px; font-size: 11px; }
  .menu-member-name { font-size: var(--font-sm); color: #fff; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
  .menu-member-flag { font-size: var(--font-sm); flex-shrink: 0; margin-left: auto; }
}
@media (max-width: 767px) and (max-height: 600px) { .profile-preview { display: none; } }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="app" id="app"></div>
<div class="toast" id="toast"></div>

<script>
const API = '/chat/api';
let currentUser = null;
let ws = null;
let currentRoom = null;
let currentRoomName = null;
let currentRoomType = null;
let rooms = [];
let messagesByRoom = {};
let typingUsers = {};
let onlineByRoom = {};
let membersByRoom = {};
let blockedUserIds = new Set();
let memberTab = storageGet('memberTab', 'online');
let unreadByRoom = {};
let _lastReadByRoom = {};
let roomTypeLookup = {};
const USER_ICON = '<svg class="icon-user" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="6" r="4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M20 17.5C20 19.9853 20 22 12 22C4 22 4 19.9853 4 17.5C4 15.0147 7.58172 13 12 13C16.4183 13 20 15.0147 20 17.5Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/></svg>';
const ICON_LOCK = '<svg class="icon-lock" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><rect x="5" y="11" width="14" height="10" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M8 11V7a4 4 0 018 0v4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>';
const ICON_BACK = '<svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M12 2.75C6.89137 2.75 2.75 6.89137 2.75 12C2.75 17.1086 6.89137 21.25 12 21.25C17.1086 21.25 21.25 17.1086 21.25 12C21.25 6.89137 17.1086 2.75 12 2.75ZM1.25 12C1.25 6.06294 6.06294 1.25 12 1.25C17.9371 1.25 22.75 6.06294 22.75 12C22.75 17.9371 17.9371 22.75 12 22.75C6.06294 22.75 1.25 17.9371 1.25 12ZM11.5303 8.46967C11.8232 8.76256 11.8232 9.23744 11.5303 9.53033L9.81066 11.25H16C16.4142 11.25 16.75 11.5858 16.75 12C16.75 12.4142 16.4142 12.75 16 12.75H9.81066L11.5303 14.4697C11.8232 14.7626 11.8232 15.2374 11.5303 15.5303C11.2374 15.8232 10.7626 15.8232 10.4697 15.5303L7.46967 12.5303C7.17678 12.2374 7.17678 11.7626 7.46967 11.4697L10.4697 8.46967C10.7626 8.17678 11.2374 8.17678 11.5303 8.46967Z"/></svg>';
let replyTo = null;
let _pendingDmTarget = null;
let _pendingDmName = '';
let isMobile = window.innerWidth < 768;
let _googleClientId = null;
let _googleInitialized = false;
let _siteShort = null;
let _msgCharLimit = 1000;
let _dmListCache = {};
let _roomEncrypted = new Set();
let _unencryptedRooms = new Set();
let _decryptRetried = new Set();
const _UPLOAD_URL_RE = /^\/chat\/uploads\/[a-f0-9]{32}\.(webp|mp4)$/;

const REACTION_EMOJIS = {'👍':'thumbs_up','❤️':'heart','😂':'laugh','🔥':'fire','😮':'wow','👏':'clap'};
const REACTION_KEYS = Object.entries(REACTION_EMOJIS);

setDbgTag('chat');

async function _bitmapToBlob(bmp, w, h) {
  if (typeof OffscreenCanvas !== 'undefined') {
    var oc = new OffscreenCanvas(w, h);
    oc.getContext('bitmaprenderer').transferFromImageBitmap(bmp);
    return oc.convertToBlob({ type: 'image/webp', quality: 0.8 });
  }
  var c = document.createElement('canvas'); c.width = w; c.height = h;
  c.getContext('2d').drawImage(bmp, 0, 0);
  bmp.close();
  return new Promise(function(resolve) { c.toBlob(resolve, 'image/webp', 0.8); });
}

// --- Avatar ---
const USER_COLORS = [
  { vivid: '#B91C1C', pastel: '#FEE2E2' },
  { vivid: '#C2410C', pastel: '#FFEDD5' },
  { vivid: '#B45309', pastel: '#FEF9C3' },
  { vivid: '#4D7C0F', pastel: '#ECFCCB' },
  { vivid: '#047857', pastel: '#D1FAE5' },
  { vivid: '#0F766E', pastel: '#CCFBF1' },
  { vivid: '#0369A1', pastel: '#E0F2FE' },
  { vivid: '#1D4ED8', pastel: '#DBEAFE' },
  { vivid: '#4338CA', pastel: '#E0E7FF' },
  { vivid: '#7E22CE', pastel: '#F3E8FF' },
  { vivid: '#A21CAF', pastel: '#FAE8FF' },
  { vivid: '#BE185D', pastel: '#FCE7F3' },
];
const SELF_COLOR = { vivid: '#64748B', pastel: '#E2E8F0' };
function msgColor(m) {
  if (m.user_id === currentUser?.id) return SELF_COLOR;
  const idx = (m.color_index != null) ? m.color_index : 0;
  return USER_COLORS[idx % USER_COLORS.length];
}
function countryFlag(code) {
  if (!code || code.length !== 2) return '';
  return String.fromCodePoint(...[...code.toUpperCase()].map(c => 0x1F1E6 + c.charCodeAt(0) - 65));
}
function avatarHtml(name, colorIndex, small, avatarUrl) {
  const cls = small ? 'avatar-sm' : 'avatar';
  if (avatarUrl) return `<div class="${cls}"><img src="${esc(avatarUrl)}" style="width:100%;height:100%;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover"></div>`;
  const initials = (name || '?').split(' ').map(w => w[0]).join('').slice(0, 2).toUpperCase();
  const color = USER_COLORS[(colorIndex || 0) % USER_COLORS.length];
  return `<div class="${cls}" style="background:${color.vivid}">${initials}</div>`;
}


// --- API helpers ---
async function api(path, opts) {
  const res = await fetch(API + path, { credentials: 'include', ...opts });
  if (!res.ok) {
    if ((res.status === 401 || res.status === 403) && path !== '/me' && path !== '/config') {
      currentUser = null;
      renderAuth();
      throw new Error('Session expired');
    }
    const err = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
    throw new Error(err.detail || res.statusText);
  }
  return res.json();
}

// --- Auth ---
async function checkAuth() {
  try { currentUser = await api('/me'); return true; }
  catch { currentUser = null; return false; }
}

async function renderAuth() {
  dbg('renderAuth');
  if (!_googleClientId) {
    try {
      const cfg = await api('/config');
      _googleClientId = cfg.google_client_id;
      _siteShort = cfg.site_short;
      if (cfg.msg_char_limit) _msgCharLimit = cfg.msg_char_limit;
      if (_siteShort) document.title = 'Chat · ' + _siteShort;
      dbg('[AUTH] google client id loaded:', _googleClientId ? 'yes' : 'no');
    } catch (e) { dbg('[AUTH] config fetch failed:', e.message); }
  }
  const googleSection = _googleClientId
    ? `<button class="auth-btn" onclick="authGoogle()">Sign in with Google</button>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;width:280px;margin:8px 0">
        <hr style="flex:1;border:none;border-top:1px solid var(--color-border)">
        <span style="font-size:var(--font-xs);color:var(--color-muted)">or</span>
        <hr style="flex:1;border:none;border-top:1px solid var(--color-border)">
      </div>`
    : '';
  document.getElementById('app').innerHTML = `
    <div class="auth-screen">
      <h2>Sign in to chat</h2>
      <p>Choose how to sign in. No passwords needed.</p>
      ${googleSection}
      <input class="auth-input" id="email-input" type="email" placeholder="your@email.com" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')authEmail()">
      <button class="auth-btn" onclick="authEmail()">Send magic link</button>
    </div>`;
  if (_googleClientId) _ensureGoogleInit();
  verify('renderAuth', document.querySelector('.auth-screen'), 'auth screen rendered');
  verify('renderAuth', document.getElementById('email-input'), 'email input exists');
}

function _initGoogle() {
  if (_googleInitialized || !_googleClientId || !window.google?.accounts?.id) return false;
  dbg('[AUTH] initializing google');
  google.accounts.id.initialize({
    client_id: _googleClientId,
    use_fedcm_for_prompt: true,
    callback: async (resp) => {
      dbg('[AUTH] google callback received');
      try {
        const result = await api('/auth/google', {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ id_token: resp.credential }),
        });
        dbg('[AUTH] google auth success:', result.id);
        currentUser = result;
        route();
      } catch (e) {
        dbg('[AUTH] google auth failed:', e.message);
        showToast(e.message);
      }
    },
  });
  _googleInitialized = true;
  return true;
}

function _ensureGoogleInit() {
  if (!window.google?.accounts?.id) {
    dbg('[AUTH] google SDK not loaded yet, retrying');
    setTimeout(_ensureGoogleInit, 200);
    return;
  }
  _initGoogle();
}

function authGoogle() {
  dbg('[AUTH] authGoogle');
  _ensureGoogleInit();
  if (window.google?.accounts?.oauth2) {
    dbg('[AUTH] using oauth2 code flow');
    const client = google.accounts.oauth2.initCodeClient({
      client_id: _googleClientId,
      scope: 'openid email profile',
      ux_mode: 'popup',
      callback: async (resp) => {
        if (resp.error) {
          dbg('[AUTH] google popup error:', resp.error);
          return;
        }
        dbg('[AUTH] google popup code received');
        try {
          const result = await api('/auth/google/code', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify({ code: resp.code }),
          });
          dbg('[AUTH] google auth success:', result.id);
          currentUser = result;
          route();
        } catch (e) {
          dbg('[AUTH] google auth failed:', e.message);
          showToast(e.message);
        }
      },
    });
    client.requestCode();
  } else if (window.google?.accounts?.id) {
    dbg('[AUTH] oauth2 unavailable, falling back to id.prompt');
    google.accounts.id.prompt();
  } else {
    showToast('Google Sign-In is not available');
  }
}

async function authEmail() {
  dbg('[AUTH] authEmail');
  const input = document.getElementById('email-input');
  const email = input.value.trim();
  if (!email) { showToast('Please enter your email'); return; }
  const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[a-zA-Z]{2,}$/;
  if (!emailRegex.test(email)) { showToast('Please enter a valid email address'); input.focus(); return; }
  try {
    await api('/login', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ email }) });
    showToast('Check your email for the sign-in link');
  } catch (e) { showToast(e.message); }
}

  ['KH','Cambodia','Kampuchea'],['CM','Cameroon','Cameroun Kamerun'],['CA','Canada'],['CV','Cape Verde','Cabo Verde'],['CF','Central African Republic','Centrafrique'],['TD','Chad','Tchad'],['CL','Chile'],['CN','China','Zhongguo'],['CO','Colombia'],['KM','Comoros','Comores'],['CG','Congo'],['CD','DR Congo'],['CR','Costa Rica'],['CI','Ivory Coast','Cote d Ivoire'],['HR','Croatia','Hrvatska'],['CU','Cuba'],['CY','Cyprus','Kypros Kibris'],['CZ','Czech Republic','Cesko Czechia'],

  ['NA','Namibia'],['NR','Nauru'],['NP','Nepal'],['NL','Netherlands','Nederland Holland'],['NZ','New Zealand','Aotearoa'],['NI','Nicaragua'],['NE','Niger'],['NG','Nigeria'],['MK','North Macedonia','Severna Makedonija'],['NO','Norway','Norge'],
  ['OM','Oman'],
